title: Blood-Soaked Rose
description: Upon pickup, add [blue]1[/blue] [red]Enthralled[/red] to your [gold]Deck[/gold]. Gain [blue]+1[/blue] at the start of each turn.
flavor: [red]Details for this relic will be revealed in the future...[/red]
notes: Increases maximum energy by 1. Upon pickup, adds 1 Enthralled curse to your deck.
